mapper.select: SELECT ID, NOTIFICATION_TYPE, NOTIFICATION_NAME, NOTIFICATION_CONTENT, NOTIFICATION_URL, NOTIFICATION_IS_READ, NOTIFICATION_READ_AT, NOTIFICATION_IS_DELETED, NOTIFICATION_CREATE_AT, USER_ID FROM TBL_NOTIFICATION WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} AND NOTIFICATION_IS_DELETED = 0 ORDER BY NOTIFICATION_CREATE_AT DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_NOTIFICATION WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} AND NOTIFICATION_IS_READ = 0 AND NOTIFICATION_IS_DELETED = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE TBL_NOTIFICATION SET NOTIFICATION_IS_READ = 1, NOTIFICATION_READ_AT = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE ID = #{id}
UPDATE TBL_NOTIFICATION SET NOTIFICATION_IS_READ = 1, NOTIFICATION_READ_AT = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} AND NOTIFICATION_IS_READ = 0
